title: Sālār Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Sālār with a Z-Score of +4.71. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Sālār is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 15.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 55%, and the wind speed is 6.1 km/h, which is not providing any significant relief. 
 The city is experiencing a critical heat wave event, and necessary precautions should be taken to ensure public safety.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
